pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 for compilation and runtime.
Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3.x.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for API documentation.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switched the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support the Java 21 migration.
Replaced apt-get commands with apk commands to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Upgraded Node.js from version 12 to version 20.17.0 using nvm to meet modern frontend build requirements.
Explicitly installed Maven via apk since the new base image no longer bundles it, ensuring the build step can execute.
Added libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or its dependencies on Alpine.
Installed git in the build image to support build-time operations that rely on git metadata or submodules.
Defined a specific entrypoint to run the generated JAR file, replacing the generic bash shell command.
